metadata.description: Football data analytics toolkit for Claude Code

plugins.name: nutmeg
plugins.description: Football data analytics toolkit. Covers 16 providers including Opta, StatsBomb, Wyscout, SportMonks, soccerdata, mplsoccer, databallpy, and free sources. Acquire, wrangle, compute, analyse, brainstorm visualisations, and review your work. Includes a searchable MCP docs server with 640+ indexed documentation chunks. 12 skills, 3 agents.
